---
name: Task
about: Standard build/review/qa task
title: "[TASK] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Objective
Describe exactly what must be built or fixed.

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Constraints
- No new dependencies unless required
- Do not refactor unrelated files
- Preserve existing behavior unless explicitly changed

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature works
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added where appropriate
- [ ] No obvious UI regressions
- [ ] PR notes explain risk and changes

## Files Likely Affected
- path/file1
- path/file2

## Reviewer Focus
- edge cases
- performance
- state transitions
- UX weirdness
